Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x257A "SUPERSKRAMBLE-0900-257A" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Super Skramble! (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0900 which copies 256 bytes of data from $0920 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. This is to workaround a rather crude copy protection mechanism at $1143, which expects an RTS after the filename loaded from tape. It then jumps to the entry point at $257A (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
Note: $3002 was changed from $FF to $FA so that the game waits on the title screen for a short while before entering demo mode.
